narrative:
Marion Twp. township has 23,239 registered voters, with 62.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.8%, a modest Republican lean of 4.3 percentage points.
